name: Pakasai Country Club
source_notes: Pakasai Country Club is the primary 18-hole tourist-facing golf course in Krabi province. Set in a tropical rubber plantation valley with the province's limestone karst formations as backdrop. Course appears across multiple aggregators (AllSquare, 1golf.eu, GolfPass) as the main course for visitors based in Ao Nang and Krabi town. Green fee 2,500 THB is a provisional foreigner rate from aggregator data — no weekend differential confirmed. Caddie 300 THB and cart 500 THB are provisional estimates consistent with southern Thailand resort courses. Caddie required inferred from context. Website and phone not confirmed from any source.
